content.Text: [Mon 2026-04-20 21:14 PDT] Create a new interactive tool page `docs/diffusion.html` for GraphVisual — a **Graph Diffusion Simulator** that lets users simulate epidemic/information spreading on networks. ## What to build A single self-contained HTML file at `docs/diffusion.html` that: 1. **Canvas graph visualization** — force-directed layout showing nodes colored by state (Susceptible=blue, Infected=red, Recovered=green, Removed=gray) 2. **3 spreading models:** - **SIR** (Susceptible → Infected → Recovered) — classic epidemic - **SIS** (Susceptible → Infected → Susceptible) — recurring infections - **Independent Cascade (IC)** — information spreading with per-edge activation probability 3. **Controls:** - Model selector (SIR/SIS/IC) - Infection rate β (slider 0-1) - Recovery rate γ (slider 0-1, for SIR/SIS) - Propagation probability p (slider 0-1, for IC) - Speed control (animation speed) - Play/Pause/Step/Reset buttons - Click nodes to set as initial infected ("patient zero") 4. **7 preset graphs:** Karate Club (34 nodes), Small World, Random (ER), Scale-Free (BA), Grid, Star, Complete K8 5. **Text input** for custom adjacency list (same format as other tools) 6. **Real-time statistics panel:** - S/I/R counts over time - A small line chart (Canvas-based) showing S/I/R curves (the classic epidemic curve) - R0 estimate (effective reproduction number) - Peak infection time & count 7. **Proactive recommendations panel** (agency feature): - Auto-detect super-spreader nodes (highest betweenness centrality among infected) - Suggest vaccination targets (top-k nodes to immunize based on degree/betweenness) - Containment score: what % of spread would be prevented by removing top-3 nodes - Alert when infection rate exceeds threshold 8. **Export:** JSON export of simulation history ## Style requirements - Use `` for base styles (already exists) - Use CSS variables: `var(--surface)`, `var(--border)`, `var(--text)`, `var(--accent)`, `var(--bg)`, `var(--text-muted)`, `var(--surface-hover)`, `var(--accent-hover)`, `var(--red)`, `var(--green)` - Match the sidebar navigation pattern from other pages. Include the full sidebar with all existing tool links plus this new one (`diffusion.html` with icon 🦠 and label "Diffusion Sim") - All custom CSS in a `
